name: octal-glyph-lvgl
description: LVGL widget that renders OctalGlyphs (radial core-ring + digit-arm glyphs) at a specified depth (3-8) and color, on a fixed 120x120px canvas. Core ring is live-drawn (lv_draw_arc); each digit arm is a pre-rendered PROGMEM sprite (baked offline, see tools/bake_sprites.py) composited with lv_draw_image -- no ThorVG, no vector-graphics module, no triangulation, no runtime shape math, no dependency beyond LVGL itself. Reusable on any LVGL 9 target (ESP32, simulator, etc).
